theme_and_archetype.rationale: For a fast-paced POS environment, high contrast and objective clarity are essential. The design follows a 'Stripe/Square' modern paradigm. It uses stark white backgrounds, dense functionality with breathing room, and a strong primary color to guide cashier actions.

rules: Headings must never use 'Inter' or generic sans; use System bold with tight tracking.
Labels must be uppercase and small (caption scale) for high legibility.
Never center align body text. Always left align dense data.

grid_patterns.pos_product_grid: 2 columns with gap-4 on mobile, 3 columns on tablet/landscape
grid_patterns.list_items: Horizontal row layout with justify-between and flex-row

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px border (#E2E8F0), rounded-xl, no heavy shadows. Add slight elevation shadow only on active states.
surface_strategies.bottom_sheet: For cart and payment summary. Sharp top-left and top-right radius (rounded-t-2xl), subtle shadow.

rules: Use bold/solid icons for active states, outlined/light for inactive.

Login.layout: Centered form, logo top, massive input fields. 1px bordered inputs.

Home_Dashboard.layout: Grid of quick action tiles (Venta, Catálogos, Reportes, Gastos).

POS_Sales.layout: Split layout (tablet) or stack layout (mobile). Top/center: Product grid with image thumbnails. Bottom: Persistent Cart summary button. Top Right: Barcode scanner icon.

Cart_Checkout.layout: Bottom sheet or dedicated screen. List of items. Large total amount.
features: Quantity controls (+/- or numpad for kg/liters)
Pay by Cash / Pay by Card via terminal buttons

Catalogs_CRUD.layout: List view with search bar. Sticky bottom 'Add New' button.

Reports.layout: Data-heavy. Sharp lines, no cards (border-collapse style).

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use React Native LayoutAnimation or Reanimated for smooth list updates and cart expansion.
motion_and_interactions.feedback: Haptic feedback (Vibration) MANDATORY on adding item to cart and successful payment.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use skeleton loaders instead of spinners for catalogs.

attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` (for React Native) and `data-testid` attribute.

image_urls.description: Stable Unsplash URLs to seed the local DB for testing and UI mockups. Do not use blank placeholders.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React Native `.js` files using standard StyleSheet or NativeWind if configured.
Ensure all text is in Spanish.
For the POS cart input (kg, liters, piezas), ensure the numerical keyboard opens and accepts decimals for kg/liters, but only integers for piezas.
Implement an offline-first architecture (e.g., using AsyncStorage, WatermelonDB, or SQLite) and handle sync logic when internet is restored.
Use `data-testid` (and `testID`) on all interactive and key informational elements.
Keep styling high-contrast and minimalist. Avoid drop shadows on everything; use 1px borders (#E2E8F0) to define sections.
For the POS printer, mock the bluetooth logic but build the complete UI/UX for ticket preview.
